subcodes.first_line: This is the night wherein hath dawned the Sun of utterance, and the showers of divine knowledge have rained down, and the ocean of wisdom hath surged, and fragrant breezes have wafted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لیل فیه اشرقت شمس البیان و هطلت امطار العرفان و ماج بحر العلم و هاج عرف
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @Word of God and human limitations, @prophecy and fulfillment, @chastisement and requital
